name: Crouton Creations
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread one tablespoon of the spread on each slice of bread.
2. Stack the bread slices and cut into cubes.
3. Sprinkle the cubes with garlic powder or other seasoning.
4. Arrange the cubes in a single layer on a baking sheet.
5. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Bake for 20 minutes, or until they are golden brown.
